note: DECLARED INPUT, not truth. A human or the causality-data-integrator authors this; term_economy.py resolves each citation against committed repo bytes and classifies. Editing this file changes a claim, never a fact. The repo (doctrine, loop/*.py, the log, glyphs/, language/) is truth.

terms.local_meaning: In the loop substrate: a unit of work whose pipeline identity is the sha256 of its file bytes in .ai-native/atoms/; it moves through the pipeline as pulses cross seams.
terms.global_meaning: In ontum at large: the fundamental, named, bounded, provenance-carrying unit — the substrate's atom is the metabolism's version of the fabric's unit of meaning.
must_not_mean: a row in a database (it is file bytes; editing the file is a NEW version that restarts the pipeline)
the physics atom or a generic 'small thing' — it carries a story, incidence, verdicts, and lineage

evidence.claim: the doctrine defines the atom's shape: story, concern_surface, incidence, verdicts, lineage
code loads atoms from .ai-native/atoms/ and folds them through the pipeline
atom.created is a real event kind on the append-only log

terms.local_meaning: The durable record a node appends when it judges an atom version: (node, artifact_hash) is the idempotence key, so a re-run never double-acts (I-2).
terms.global_meaning: Provenance made append-only: every verdict in ontum is attributable, replayable, and never erased — history is never retro-invalidated.
must_not_mean: a UI toast or a log line you can delete (it is appended, never consumed; superseding, never erasure)

evidence.claim: the doctrine specifies the receipt's fields (event_id, node, artifact_hash, verdict, ...)
code constructs receipts with the content-hashed idempotence key
rcp.* records are real on the receipts log

terms.local_meaning: In the loop: a named, subscribable event surface between pipeline stages (author-to-value, value-to-placement, ...) where atoms announce state changes and nodes append verdicts.
terms.global_meaning: The boundary where two things are joined and the join itself is first-class — a failure to fit is data, not an error.
must_not_mean: ONLY the loop event-surface OR ONLY the phase-2 Site-primitive — the word names both, and they are not the same object

evidence.contains: A seam is a durable, subscribable event surface
evidence.claim: the doctrine defines seam as the loop's event surface
the PIPELINE names seams between stages
events on the log carry a seam field

evidence.contains: **Seam** | SETTLED | A primitive that is a join
evidence.claim: in the phase-2 vocabulary Seam is a geometric Site primitive (a transition-cocycle), SETTLED — a DIFFERENT object from the loop's event surface

terms.local_meaning: A summoned, mortal judging position in the pipeline: it blinks in at a place, reads the local environment, does one bounded thing, writes one receipt through the one pen, and dissolves (D-10). Mock until a node_real admission names a real one.
terms.global_meaning: The system's standing offer — work is answered by summoning, not staffed by long-lived processes; a node is where a kind of meaning gets its first sensor.
must_not_mean: a long-lived server/daemon you babysit (it is summoned, not staffed)
a graph vertex in the abstract — a node here carries a prompt, a hash, a rung, and authority

evidence.contains: D-10. Nodes are summoned, not staffed
evidence.claim: the doctrine's D-10 defines the node as a summoned standing offer

evidence.contains: def judge(root, atom_id, node, verdict, reason)
evidence.claim: the one pen by which a summoned node writes its verdict
node_real admissions are how a mock node becomes real, read from the log at runtime

terms.local_meaning: Two things share this word: (1) the arc_confirmed admission — bdo's standing stamp that authorizes every piece under an epic; (2) the prose 'arc' field in an epic JSON file — a narrative of intent that no code enforces.
terms.global_meaning: The level the owner steers at — not tickets, not pieces, but the confirmed direction one stamp authorizes many lands of.
must_not_mean: a per-ticket approval (it is the level ABOVE pieces; one confirmation authorizes many)
ONLY the enforced admission OR ONLY the prose field — the enforced sense and the documentary sense share one word

evidence.claim: code reads the active arc_confirmed admission for an epic
arc_confirmed is a real, load-bearing admission kind on the log
every epic JSON carries a prose 'arc' field — documentary intent, with no enforcement path on the log
